section.heading: Funds for programs and activities

subsection.heading: Funds available under section 2151a of this title unaffected by other provisions

content.p: The President is authorized to use any of the funds hereafter made available under section 2151a of this title to carry out the purposes of this subpart. Funds made available for such purposes may be used without regard to the provisions of sections 2151h(b) and 2151t(d) of this title.

Foreign currencies owned by the United States and determined by the Secretary of the Treasury to be excess to the needs of the United States shall be used to the maximum extent possible in lieu of dollars in carrying out the provisions of this subpart.
Assistance authorized under this subpart shall be in addition to any allotments or grants that may be made under other authorizations.

subsection.heading: Disclosure of funds to Administrator; annual report

content.p: Universities may accept and expend funds from other sources, public and private, in order to carry out the purposes of this subpart. All such funds, both prospective and inhand, shall be periodically disclosed to the Administrator as he shall by regulation require, but no less often than in an annual report.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–195, pt. I, § 299, as added Pub. L. 94–161, title III, § 312, Dec. 20, 1975, 89 Stat. 865; amended Pub. L. 95–424, title I, § 102(c)(2), Oct. 6, 1978, 92 Stat. 941.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1978—Subsec. (a). Pub. L. 95–424 substituted “sections 2151h(b) and 2151t(d) of this title” for “sections 2151h(b), 2171(a), and 2171(d) of this title”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1978 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 95–424 effective Oct. 1, 1978, see section 605 of Pub. L. 95–424, set out as a note under section 2151 of this title.

note.heading: Delegation of Functions
note.p: For delegation of functions of President under this section, see Ex. Ord. No. 12163, Sept. 29, 1979, 44 F.R. 56673, as amended, set out as a note under section 2381 of this title.
